2606.11926.title: Toward Generalist Autonomous Research via Hypothesis-Tree Refinement
2606.11926.paper_summary: Scientific progress depends on a repeated loop of exploration, experimentation, and abstraction. Researchers test candidate directions, interpret the evidence, and carry the resulting lessons into later attempts. We study how an AI agent can run this loop autonomously over long horizons. We introduce Arbor, a general framework for autonomous research that combines a long-lived coordinator, short-lived executors, and Hypothesis Tree Refinement (HTR), a persistent tree that links hypotheses, artifacts, evidence, and distilled insights across time. The coordinator manages global research strategy over the tree, while executors implement and test individual hypotheses in isolated worktrees. As results return, Arbor updates the tree, propagates reusable lessons, refines the search frontier, and admits verified improvements. This design turns autonomous research from a sequence of local attempts into a cumulative process in which strategy, execution, and evidence are carried across time. We evaluate Arbor under Autonomous Optimization (AO), an operational setting where an agent improves an initial research artifact through iterative experimentation without step-level human supervision. Across six real research tasks in model training, harness engineering, and data synthesis, Arbor achieves the best held-out result on all six tasks, attaining more than 2.5x the average relative held-out gain of Codex and Claude Code under the same task interface and resource budget. On MLE-Bench Lite, Arbor reaches 86.36% Any Medal with GPT-5.5, the strongest result in our comparison.
2606.11926.paper_summary_zh: 科學進步依賴於探索、實驗和抽象的重複循環。研究人員測試候選方向，解釋證據，並將所得的教訓帶入後續的嘗試。我們研究如何讓 AI 代理在長期內自主運行這個循環。我們介紹 Arbor，這是一個自主研究的通用框架，結合了長期協調者、短期執行者和假設樹精煉（HTR），這是一棵持久的樹，將假設、工件、證據和提煉的見解隨著時間連結起來。協調者管理整個樹的全球研究策略，而執行者則在孤立的工作樹中實施和測試個別假設。隨著結果的返回，Arbor 更新樹，傳播可重用的教訓，精煉搜索邊界，並接受經過驗證的改進。這一設計將自主研究從一系列局部嘗試轉變為一個累積過程，其中策略、執行和證據跨越時間延續。我們在自主優化（AO）下評估 Arbor，這是一個操作環境，代理通過迭代實驗改善初始研究工件，而無需逐步的人類監督。在六個真實的研究任務中，包括模型訓練、裝置工程和數據合成，Arbor 在所有六個任務上都達到了最佳的保留結果，獲得了超過 Codex 和 Claude Code 在相同任務介面和資源預算下的平均相對保留增益的 2.5 倍以上。在 MLE-Bench Lite 上，Arbor 與 GPT-5.5 一起達到了 86.36% 的任何獎牌，這是我們比較中的最佳結果。
2606.11926.author: Jiajie Jin et.al.
2606.11926.authors: Jiajie Jin, Yuyang Hu, Kai Qiu, Qi Dai, Chong Luo, Guanting Dong, Xiaoxi Li, Tong Zhao, Xiaolong Ma, Gongrui Zhang, Zhirong Wu, Bei Liu, Zhengyuan Yang, Linjie Li, Lijuan Wang, Hongjin Qian, Yutao Zhu, Zhicheng Dou
